## Branding
- **Logo concept:** Bird-inspired geometric design
  - The "E" functions as wings (angular, geometric extensions suggesting lift)
  - The two "K" diagonals form a sharp, tapered tail
  - The "Z" acts as the head

- **Cultural influence:** Ipanema sidewalk wave pattern explored as brand element
- **Logo animation:** ZA monogram slides open to reveal full ZEKKA text
- **Faceless theme page:** Marketing-focused Instagram page researched (bold text on dark backgrounds, saves > likes)
- **Name origin:** Explored business nicknames from "Luke Colandrea" — Luca, Lando, Colex, etc. Settled on Zekka separately

## Colandrea Buick GMC



## Overview
Car dealership owned and operated by Luke's parents. Located in New York.

## Status: ZEKKA'S FIRST REAL CLIENT
As of 2026-04-26, Luke discovered that the dealership's marketing is **NOT corporate-controlled**. Rick (Luke's dad) is giving Luke the green light to run ads for specific Buick inventory they want to move. This is a game-changer:
- **Real client** with real ad budget — no cold outreach needed
- **Built-in trust** — it's family, zero sales cycle
- **Instant case study** — car dealership ad results are extremely measurable (leads, test drives, sales)
- **Repeatable** — every month there are new cars to move, so this isn't a one-off

## Previous Assumption (OUTDATED)
~~It's a franchise — corporate controls all marketing.~~ **WRONG.** Marketing decisions are made at the dealership level. Luke can run ads for specific inventory.

## Opportunity
- Run Meta/Google ads for specific Buicks the dealership wants to sell
- Track results: impressions → clicks → leads → test drives → sales
- Build a case study with hard numbers (cost per lead, ROAS)
- Use this case study to land other dealership clients or any local business

## The Decision

- Luke has a 12-day Cancun networking trip
- Brazilian family visiting for the World Cup (~1 week)

**Plan to tell Martin:**
- Talk to parents first (they know Martin personally, can help frame it respectfully)
- Then message Martin ASAP before he returns from Czech Republic in May
- Frame around the trips making it impossible, not quitting for business reasons
- Tell him early = respect his time to find a replacement

- **Cash on hand:** $1,585
- **Car payments:** $200/mo through August 1 = $800 remaining
- **Owes dad:** $3,500 by August 25
- **Total obligations:** $4,300 + trip costs + college move-in
- **Needs to make:** $6,000-8,000 by August minimum

- Run Envista ad campaign for Colandrea Buick GMC for free
- In exchange, $3,500 debt to dad is wiped
- Needs to pitch this to dad and get agreement

3. **New Zekka clients** — cold outreach to local businesses ($500-750/mo each)

## Why This Summer Matters

- Tennis coaching = dead-end income that stops when he leaves
- Zekka = business that runs from a dorm room and compounds
- This is the runway to build before college starts

## [2026-04-24] upgrade | Prospect Pipeline v2 — Full Overhaul
Major upgrade to `scripts/prospect-pipeline.py`. Pipeline went from 7 phases to 12:
- **NEW: Dedup** — scans all previous `wiki/prospects/pipeline-*.md` files, removes already-processed handles
- **NEW: US/English filter** — scores US likelihood via bio language, TLD, city names, flag emojis, currency symbols, foreign keywords. Strict mode (`--us-only`) or moderate mode (default)
- **NEW: Engagement rate calculator** — pulls last 10-12 posts via Apify, calculates real engagement %, avg likes, avg comments per prospect
- **NEW: Multi-source owner finder** — chains Apollo → Hunter.io → website About page scrape. Website scraper hits /about, /pages/about, /about-us, /our-story and regex-matches founder names
- **NEW: Owner IG name search** — when owner name is known but IG handle isn't, generates common handle patterns (firstname.lastname, firstnamelastname, etc.) and checks if they exist via Apify
- **NEW: Scoring & ranking** — 0-100 outreach readiness score based on engagement (25pts), US location (20pts), owner found (20pts), ad-free (15pts), website (10pts), follower sweet spot (10pts). Prospects sorted highest-first with badges (ELITE/GOOD/OK/LOW)
- **NEW: Auto DM drafting** — generates ice breaker + pitch DMs in Luke's voice, personalized by brand vibe (luxury/street/heritage/minimal/artisan/indie)
- **NEW: CLI flags** — `--us-only` for strict US filter, `--top N` for top-N output only
- **NEW: Run stats header** — each pipeline output now shows total, elite count, avg score, US confirmed, owners found, handles found
- **Hunter.io integration** — optional API key for email/owner fallback when Apollo misses
- Updated Shea's agent config (.agents/shea.md) with v2 docs

## [2026-04-20] integration | NeuroLinked Brain Connected
Connected NeuroLinked V1.3 neuromorphic brain to the Mega Mind ecosystem. Full MCP integration with Claude Code.

## Key Concepts
- **Agent Performance System**: Every week, Jose collects data from all active agents, analyzes performance, and delivers a single consolidated report to Luke. This isn't just a summary — it's a diagnosis. Jose identifies what's moving the needle, what's wasting cycles, and what needs to change.
- **Automated Outreach**: Build a system that books high-quality meetings for the setter program while Luke is in school. The system does the heavy lifting — Luke only needs to handle callbacks and qualify leads.
- **Lead Generation Strategies**: Luke needs volume of qualified diesel mechanic leads to hit top 10 setters by June. The bottleneck is lead volume, not conversion quality (20% commission, 70% closer rate).
- **Neglected Business Opportunities**: Luke noticed that viral business models (day trading, SMMA, dropshipping, brand scaling, crypto) are:
- **Personal Branding**: Instagram followers don't build credibility with B2B audiences like diesel shop owners. LinkedIn profile + verified status with proof of work (posts about results) builds trust better. Personal referrals and personality-driven outreach matter more than follower counts for B2B.
- **Revenue Scaling Framework**: Framework for scaling a digital agency from $0 to $1M ARR, distilled from deep research.

- Jose Telegram Bot: live 24/7 on Railway
